pi_items.source: task.json metadata field and task.json description (line 5): 'Create a new Unit of Measure in iDempiere named 'Retail Box of 24' with symbol 'BX24''
task.json metadata field and task.json description (line 5): 'Create a new Unit of Measure in iDempiere named 'Retail Box of 24''
task.json metadata field and task.json description (line 5): 'configure a global conversion rate for this new UOM so that 1 Box equals 24 'Each''

X12 EDI standard (https://www.stedi.com/edi/x12/element/355), iDempiere/ADempiere documentation confirming EA as standard abbreviation for 'Each', and task description stating conversion target is to 'Each' UOM which uses EA symbol in iDempiere

privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a synthetic Unit of Measure (UOM) in iDempiere's GardenWorld client database. The new UOM is named 'Retail Box of 24' with symbol 'BX24' and standard precision of 0. A global UOM conversion must be created with multiply rate of 24, converting from the new BX24 unit to 'Each' (EA), with no product restriction to ensure global applicability. The 'Each' (EA) unit is a standard base UOM in GardenWorld. All values match iDempiere standards and X12 EDI conventions.
